title: Create: Clipboard Curios
description: Adds the Clipboard from Create mod to Curios.
body:
This mod allows the Clipboard, from Create Mod, to be used in Curios!

You can access the Clipboard by pressing a keybind, configurable in settings (it has no default, so remember to set it!)

It goes into the 'body' slot and adds another slot. If you don't want another slot, you can change this in Curios API's Common Config. 

<details>
<summary>How to remove extra slot</summary>
Add id="body";size=1;operation="REMOVE" to remove the slot that comes with this mod.
</details>
